posts.text:
Books can take kids anywhere, and sometimes all it takes is the right nudge to get them fired up to read.

We’ve got some tips from the experts because every kid deserves that spark 📖

Video

Thank you to our first responders and emergency crews in Northern Michigan and the UP working around the clock to keep Michiganders safe.

As winter conditions continue to worsen throughout the region, please stay inside and stay safe.

I received the good news this afternoon that FEMA officially granted our appeal after I met with the president earlier this week. This will help lower costs for Michiganders who have shouldered the burden for utility repairs.


Detroit Free Press (@freep)

Gov. Whitmer meets with Trump, secures emergency aid, talk Great Lakes 
📸 Provided By Matthew Clara, Michigan Department Of Natural Resources
freep.com/story/news/politic…





— https://nitter.net/freep/status/2031503990081380473#m

Antisemitism is hate, plain and simple. It has no home here in Michigan.

Now more than ever, we must hold each other closer and choose love over hate. Michigan has and will always be stronger together.

Michigan is at its best when we are together. What I saw following yesterday's attack was a Michigan that shows up when tragedy strikes and stands beside our neighbors. 

No attempt to divide us will break that.

We are wishing the hero who was injured a speedy recovery.
 
As we process this awful attack, let's wrap our arms around West Bloomfield and our state's Jewish community. We are stronger together.

Today's attack is every community's worst nightmare. We saw incredible people step up today to save lives and stop the suspect. Our state is grateful to the security personnel for their bravery and law enforcement who jumped into action to keep students safe.

Last week, I joined the lunch line at Baker Middle School to help serve lunch and spend some time with students.  When kids know they can count on a good meal at school, they can focus on what really matters: learning.

Video

Now, the Supreme Court has ruled that a large swath of the administration’s tariffs are illegal. Congress must act to rein in these irresponsible tariff policies and put more money back in Michiganders’ pockets.

In the wake of the Supreme Court decision on Trump's tariffs, I led 19 states in calling on Congress to work on a more strategic, commonsense trade policy.

Tariffs have jacked up costs on cars, food, and housing, and Michiganders are paying the price. wnem.com/2026/03/11/whitmer-…

Sharing is caring! Grab a friend, a good book, and dive into a new adventure this National Reading Month 📖

Video

It shouldn’t be so hard to build the homes people need in the places they want to live.
 
It’s time we make it easier to build homes by cutting red tape, streamlining zoning, and improving building codes. Let’s get this done so we can build more homes quicker, at a lower cost.

It takes a BIG team to feed our kids, and our lunch aides are the real MVPs.

When our students win, Michigan wins. Let’s change the game for good and make free school meals permanent 🍽️

Video

Michiganders deserve real relief from medical debt. I'm ready to take action by:✅Capping interest rates✅Keeping medical debt off your credit report✅Requiring hospitals to set up financial assistance programs✅Banning liens or foreclosures on homes because of medical debt
